# zstack_iam2_organization (Resource)

Manages an IAM2 Organization in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the IAM2 organization
- `type` (String) The type of the IAM2 organization (e.g., Department)

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the IAM2 organization
- `parent_uuid` (String) The UUID of the parent organization

### Read-Only

- `root_organization_uuid` (String) The UUID of the root organization
- `src_type` (String) The source type of the IAM2 organization
- `state` (String) The state of the IAM2 organization
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the IAM2 organization
